use_cases: Displaying project portfolios in a visually engaging 3D folder interface
Showcasing creative work with hover animations and lightbox previews
Creating interactive project galleries for portfolio websites
Building media-rich product showcases with smooth transitions
Developing portfolio sections for agencies and creative professionals
ai_summary: An interactive 3D folder component that displays projects in a card-based interface with lightbox functionality. Features smooth hover animations with glow effects, perspective transforms, and click-to-expand behavior. The component tracks element positions for seamless lightbox transitions and supports project navigation within an elegant folder metaphor. Ideal for portfolio sections, project showcases, and creative galleries.
